TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Xi_Jinping, title = Xi_Jinping, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xi_Jinping} }

S.FORM: Xi Jinping Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 6 jiyax 15 ka Xi Jinping ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan China ta sayang o kiya ka Xi Jinping, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 11 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: xi ɟinpiŋ mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka xi ɟinpiŋ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦħina ta sajaŋ o kija ka xi ɟinpiŋ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: Xi Jinping Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 6 jiyax 15 ka Xi Jinping ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan China ta sayang o kiya ka Xi Jinping, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 11 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: xi ɟinpiŋ mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka xi ɟinpiŋ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦħina ta sajaŋ o kija ka xi ɟinpiŋ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
